zh.lifeSummary: 當Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg於1122年出生時，她的父親Hugo IX. von Dagsburg27歲，母親Gertrude van Loon32歲。她於1169年之前與Heinrich I von Salm在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1169年在比利時享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg于1122年出生时，她的父亲Hugo IX. von Dagsburg27岁，母亲Gertrude van Loon32岁。她于1169年之前与Heinrich I von Salm在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1169年在比利时享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: und
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Runte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erhard.

German: in the northwest of Germany most probably a topographic name from a field name based on run ‘mud’, which gave rise to several placenames in the Rhine-Ruhr area, for example Runten, Runtenberg, Rünthe near Hamm, Westphalia.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Clementia
meanings: A female name formed from Clement.

en.lifeSummary: When Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg was born in 1122, her father, Hugo IX. von Dagsburg, was 27 and her mother, Gertrude van Loon, was 32. She married Heinrich I von Salm before 1169, in Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1169, in Belgium, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg est née en 1122, son père, Hugo IX. von Dagsburg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Gertrude van Loon, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich I von Salm avant 1169, à Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1169, à Belgique, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg 1122 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugo IX. von Dagsburg 27 und ihre Mutter Gertrude van Loon 32. Sie hat vor 1169 in Salm, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Heinrich I von Salm geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1169 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg è nata il nel 1122, sua padre, Hugo IX. von Dagsburg, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Gertrude van Loon, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich I von Salm prima del 1169, nel Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1169, nel Belgio, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburgが1122年に生まれた時，父Hugo IX. von Dagsburgは27歳，母Gertrude van Loonは32歳であった。1169年以前にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンサルムでHeinrich I von Salmと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1169年にベルギーで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg(이)가 1122년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugo IX. von Dagsburg(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude van Loon(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1169년 이전 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 살름에서 Heinrich I von Salm(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1169년 벨기에에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg nasceu em 1122, seu pai, Hugo IX. von Dagsburg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude van Loon, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich I von Salm antes 1169, em Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1169, em Bélgica, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg родилась в 1122 г., её отцу по имени Hugo IX. von Dagsburg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude van Loon, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich I von Salm перед 1169 г. в местности салм, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1169 г. в местности Бельгия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clementia von Egisheim und von Dagsburg nació en 1122, su papá, Hugo IX. von Dagsburg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Gertrude van Loon, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Heinrich I von Salm antes de 1169, en Salm, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1169, en Bélgica, a la edad de 47 años.
